personal.name: Sarim Farooq
personal.title: AI Developer & Engineer
personal.bio:
Building Intelligence. Shipping AI That Works.
Applied AI Engineer specializing in production LLM systems, RAG pipelines, and intelligent automation — deployed across fintech and enterprise.

achievements: Best Internee Award (Top 2 of cohort) at AI GenMat
Deployed automated customer service solutions for Al Dar Exchange (Qatar)
Architected medallion data lake handling 400–500 GB of raw government health data

experience.description: Built NLP-driven customer service automation for fintech clients including Al Dar Exchange (Qatar), reducing manual support workload by ~35% using GPT-4o and Claude-powered pipelines. Designed and deployed end-to-end conversational AI systems and intelligent workflows integrated across CRM and support platforms.

Best Internee Award (Top 2 of cohort). Built core ML modules for a DNS Security Engine with threat feed integration, improving malicious domain detection by ~25%. Automated feature engineering and NLP prototyping pipelines, boosting team testing throughput by ~20%.

Architected a medallion data lake on AWS (Bronze/Silver/Gold) processing 400–500 GB of raw CMS government health data; automated daily ingestion across 100+ Excel datasets. Built a parameter-based filtering interface for custom Excel exports, replacing a fully manual workflow.

certifications.name: Preprocessing Unstructured Data for LLM Applications

projects.title: AI Multi-Modal Content Generation (FYP)
projects.description: End-to-end pipeline transcribing bilingual Urdu/English audio, refining scripts via LLM, cloning the speaker's voice adaptively, and producing lip-synced video — built for creators with no technical expertise.

projects.title: Context-Aware RAG Agent
projects.description: Privacy-first document intelligence with local LLM inference; hybrid semantic + keyword retrieval at 75%+ accuracy, OCR pipeline, LRU caching with 95% speedup — 50-page docs in under 45 seconds.

projects.title: Real-Time Object Detection & Analytics
projects.description: Multi-model YOLOv8 pipeline with 2–5× speedup via optimized frame sampling; dashboard with zone heatmaps, temporal tracking, 100% test coverage. Fully containerized.

projects.title: NewsLens: NLP News Intelligence
projects.description: Processed 70,000+ news sources for real-time sentiment analysis and media bias detection using transformer classifier with spaCy NER and structured SQLite analytics backend.

internship.workStyle: Remote, self-driven engineer capable of independent end-to-end AI system deployment.
internship.goals: Develop and deploy advanced state-of-the-art AI tooling and optimization architectures that augment complex workflows.

funFacts: My FYP creates fully lip-synced multi-lingual generative video outputs.
Architected systems reducing manual workflows by 35% in enterprise environments.
personality.workingStyle: I focus on delivering end-to-end smart pipelines that scale, tracking strictly the real-world value over hypothetical metrics.
personality.motivation: Shipping AI that actually works in production, avoiding hype and focusing on robust applied intelligence.
